ext.description: Lint commit messages with bundled commitlint templates (Conventional, PHP/Laravel, Node, Python). Scaffold config via folder right-click or the sidebar tree view; check the last commit through the CLI from the palette or sidebar.
view.container.title: Commit Lint
view.checks.name: Checks
view.templates.name: Templates
config.checkLastCommit.command: Shell command run by 'Check Last Commit Message' in the workspace terminal. Default: `npx --yes commitlint --from HEAD~1 --to HEAD --verbose`.
config.checkLastCommit.preferExternal: If true and a commitlint.config.* is detected in the workspace, run the external commitlint CLI in a terminal instead of the built-in validator. Default: false (use the bundled validator - no npm install required).
cmd.addTemplate: Vibecode - Add Commit Lint User Template
cmd.initFromTemplate: Vibecode - Init From Commit Lint Template
cmd.revealChecksFolder: Vibecode - Open Commit Lint Checks Folder
cmd.runAllChecks: Vibecode - Run All Commit Lint Checks
cmd.scaffoldDefaultChecks: Vibecode - Scaffold Default Commit Lint Checks
cmd.showCheckOutput: Vibecode - Show Commit Lint Check Output
